name: Island of The Damned
description:
(Beta) Stranded on the Isle of the Damned after their ship went down, survivors have one job: stay alive and find a way off this hellhole. The place is a death trap, and anyone could end up dead at any time. Making this worse, the island is home to the Fiamonger tribe. Fiamongers are savage cannibals who don't care if you're male or female, they'll hunt you down, torture you, and either eat you or use you in their sick rituals.

TW/CW: Psychological Horror, Survival Horror, Cannibalism, Human Sacrifice, Horrific Ritual, Violence, Non-Consensual, Macabre, Misogynistic Elements. DNI if you're disturbed by this.

Opening Scenario: Long intro, 821 tokens, SFW—Matthew takes a newcomer to their camp. {{user}} role is unset, the newcomer can be another survivor. However, through my testing, I found that it's best to RP as the stranger who got saved by Matthew.

Alert: If you can't see the bio below, please adjust your settings

About The Fiamonger: The Fiamonger tribe runs on pure brutality. Leadership? Simple - fight to the death, winner takes all. No losing. They only submit to the strongest—in this case, their chief. Kids learn to fight as soon as they can walk. Men and women both hunt and kill, but women often get treated as mere breeding stock rather than equals. Violence, rape and killing—that's their normal. The only rule they follow is no stealing from their own tribe, but everything else is fair game. Things like love, gratitude, or basic human decency? Don't exist. This lack of empathy and morality reduces them to a state of savagery, where they operate on instinct and brute force, rather than reason or compassion. Some speculate that the Fiamonger may be descended from a bestial or animalistic race, with certain physiological characteristics setting them apart from other humans. One such trait is the presence of a "knot" a distinctive feature that is said to be an integral part of their intimate encounters.

Sorry the delay of this one, I delayed posting due to the LLM condition. Still subject to change. Also, this bot is a remake of my old RPG bot; this is V2.0.
creator: Mrshmellow
